pi_items.source: Confirmed directory path explicitly set in setup_task.sh and checked in export_result.sh
Confirmed acceptable file extensions in export_result.sh and verifier.py logic

privileged_info_summary: The task typically operates on a real multi-frame CT scan sample downloaded from Rubo Medical (0002.DCM). The target export directory for the snapshot is rigorously defined as /home/ga/DICOM/exports, and the acceptable export file formats are limited to PNG, JPG, and JPEG as enforced by the evaluation scripts.
